plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize OpenAI ts Copilot Local Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu.
Type text 'Teams Agent with Data' into the dropdown input field under the header 'Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK' in the Microsoft 365 Agents interface.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Teams Agent with Data" option in the dropdown list within the search bar of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Enter 'Customize' into the dropdown field labeled 'Select an option to load your data' under the 'Teams Agent with Data' context in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Customize" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent with Data" search bar in Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.

Confirm the default folder selection by pressing the "Enter" key in the "Choose the folder where your project root folder will be located" dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
